name: Cyber Tower
short_description: Tricky maps, insane waves. Once you master the path, enemies are nothing.
detailed_description:
Cyber Tower offers an intense and polished tower defense experience, placing a strong emphasis on strategic path building. Inspired by classic tower defense games, Cyber Tower combines stylized minimalist graphics with a cyberpunk theme and visually striking designs.

Your success hinges on the thoughtful placement of sci-fi towers, directly influencing the routes taken by enemy forces. Tailor your strategy by choosing the right tower types and crafting intricate mazes or strategic chokepoints to control the battlefield. Experiment with diverse route configurations to outsmart adversaries and enhance your towers' effectiveness. Safeguard your city by preventing waves of various virus-infected autonomous vehicles from breaching its defenses.

Updated UI


Main Features


  • Strategic Gameplay: Engage in gameplay that requires strategic path planning to outsmart your foes.
  • Distinctive Turrets: Deploy unique and powerful turrets to fortify your defense.
  • Diverse Enemies: Confront a variety of enemy types, each requiring a different approach.
  • Varied Challenges: Explore 40 intricately designed maps that provide a challenging experience.
  • Conquer Achievements: Pursue success and unlock a range of Steam Achievements.
  • 3-Star Excellence: Strive for mastery with a comprehensive 3-star rating system on each level.
